content.tagline: Craftsmanship That Holds Up On The Water
content.about:
Comprehensive Upholstery is a premier marine services company proudly serving boat owners throughout Tampa, FL and the greater Tampa Bay Area. Located at 8705 N 13th St in Tampa, we specialize in three core areas of marine craftsmanship: custom marine canvas fabrication, expert boat carpentry, and professional marine upholstery. Whether you're docked at a marina on Tampa Bay or cruising the Gulf Coast waters, we bring the same level of care and precision to every project we take on.

Our work covers a wide range of services built around protecting and restoring your vessel. From custom-fabricated boat covers and bimini tops to full marine canvas enclosures, we build pieces designed to withstand Florida's sun, salt air, and heavy rains. Our upholstery work includes seat cushion replacement, helm chair restoration, and full interior re-upholstery using marine-grade materials that resist UV damage and moisture. Every stitch, seam, and panel is handled with the kind of attention to detail that sets a properly finished boat apart from the rest.

We serve boat owners across the South Florida region, including communities throughout Hillsborough County, Pinellas County, and the surrounding Tampa Bay area — within about 40 miles of our Tampa shop. Our clients range from weekend recreational boaters to serious offshore fishermen, and they all share one thing in common: they refuse to compromise on quality when it comes to their boat. At Comprehensive Upholstery, neither do we.
content.seoTitle: Comprehensive Upholstery | Marine Canvas, Covers & Upholstery Tampa, FL
content.seoDescription: Custom marine canvas, boat covers & upholstery in Tampa, FL. Serving South Florida within 40 miles. Call Comprehensive Upholstery today.

serviceDescriptions.Marine Canvas, Covers & Upholstery: Comprehensive Upholstery fabricates and installs custom marine canvas work including bimini tops, boat covers, cockpit enclosures, and dodgers using marine-grade fabrics built to handle UV exposure, salt air, and heavy weather. Upholstery services include full seat cushion replacement, helm chair restoration, and interior re-upholstery using moisture-resistant, UV-stable materials suited for open-water use. Every piece is custom-fitted to your vessel to ensure a clean, professional finish that lasts.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Tampa, FL, Comprehensive Upholstery serves boat owners throughout South Florida within a 40-mile radius.
commonProjects: Custom bimini top fabrication and installation for offshore and bay boats
Full boat cover fabrication using marine-grade, UV-resistant canvas material
Cockpit enclosure and side curtain fabrication for weather protection
Complete marine seat cushion replacement with moisture-resistant upholstery
Helm chair and captain's seat restoration using marine-grade vinyl
Full boat interior re-upholstery including headliners and side panels
Dodger and canvas enclosure repair or replacement for cruising vessels
